rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, did it anyway, that's the win and it's a good one. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday, change room, active choice — counts. But the Apollo ring and necklace at work? Joy police got that one, and they got it twice over: pool nerves AND 'reads as obviously gay' doing the heavy lifting. Poncho still on at Balmoral, same as last week.
pattern: They're loudest where being seen actually costs something — work, his people, anywhere the visibility is real and not just possible.
focus: This week's Internal Work: Wednesday midweek pulse check-in.
